pageContext.name: ZGMF-1017 Ginn Ver. A.N.I.M.E
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Bandai are excited to present the ZGMF-1017 Ginn Ver. A.N.I.M.E Collectible Figure!  Commemorating 20 years since its debut, 'Mobile Suit Gundam SEED' joins the Ver. A.N.I.M.E. series! This action figure of the Ginn features all of the posabilities and accessories you've come to expect, plus dynamic proportions that capture its on-screen appearance. Extendible parts allow for smooth, natural posing however you like.   Bandai Spirits fans don't miss your chance to add this figure to your collection today!
